description: Email delivery service for sending transactional and marketing emails via the Resend API.

tools.name: send_email
tools.description: Send a single email to a recipient with optional HTML and plain text content.

to.description: The recipient's email address where the email will be delivered.

subject.description: The subject line that appears in the recipient's inbox.

html.description: The HTML-formatted content of the email body.

text.description: The plain text version of the email body, used as fallback when HTML is not supported.

from_email.description: The sender's email address that appears in the 'From' field.

reply_to.description: The email address where replies will be directed.

cc.description: List of email addresses to receive a carbon copy of the email.

bcc.description: List of email addresses to receive a blind carbon copy of the email.

id.description: The unique identifier assigned to the sent email by Resend.

tools.name: send_batch_emails
tools.description: Send multiple emails in a single API request for improved efficiency.

emails.description: List of email objects, each containing to, subject, html, text, from, reply_to, cc, and bcc fields.

id.description: The unique identifier assigned to the sent email by Resend.

to.description: The recipient's email address where the email was delivered.

from.description: The sender's email address that appears in the 'From' field.

created_at.description: The timestamp when the email was created, in ISO 8601 format.

data.description: List of successfully sent emails with their metadata.

tools.name: get_email
tools.description: Retrieve detailed information about a previously sent email, including delivery status and content.

email_id.description: The unique identifier assigned to the sent email by Resend.

object.description: The object type, always 'email' for this response.

id.description: The unique identifier assigned to the sent email by Resend.

to.description: List of recipient email addresses where the email was delivered.

from.description: The sender's email address that appears in the 'From' field.

created_at.description: The timestamp when the email was created, in ISO 8601 format.

subject.description: The subject line that appears in the recipient's inbox.

html.description: The HTML-formatted content of the email body.

text.description: The plain text version of the email body.

bcc.description: List of email addresses that received a blind carbon copy of the email.

cc.description: List of email addresses that received a carbon copy of the email.

reply_to.description: List of email addresses where replies are directed.

last_event.description: The most recent delivery event status, such as delivered, opened, clicked, bounced, or complained.

tools.name: list_emails
tools.description: Retrieve a paginated list of sent emails with optional domain filtering.

domain_id.description: The unique identifier of the domain to filter emails by.

limit.description: The maximum number of emails to return in the response (default: 50, maximum: 100).

object.description: The object type, always 'list' for this response.

id.description: The unique identifier assigned to the sent email by Resend.

to.description: List of recipient email addresses where the email was delivered.

from.description: The sender's email address that appears in the 'From' field.

created_at.description: The timestamp when the email was created, in ISO 8601 format.

subject.description: The subject line that appears in the recipient's inbox.

status.description: The current delivery status of the email, such as pending, delivered, bounced, or failed.

data.description: List of emails matching the query criteria.

tools.name: update_email
tools.description: Modify a scheduled email's send time before it is delivered.

email_id.description: The unique identifier assigned to the sent email by Resend.

scheduled_at.description: The new scheduled delivery time for the email, in ISO 8601 format.

id.description: The unique identifier assigned to the sent email by Resend.

scheduled_at.description: The updated scheduled delivery time for the email, in ISO 8601 format.
